action: Climbed to the eastern cliff before sunrise and sat there alone, watching the horizon.
thought: Woke up 5am, couldn't sleep anyway. This cliff is good. Nobody comes here.

action: Started laying the foundation for a second room in his house, just in case.
thought: Eh, space for one more lah. Never know who might need it. Better to have than not have.

action: Slept in until 9am, then walked barefoot down to the shore for a swim.
thought: Salt water, quiet beach, no Slack notifications. This is fine actually.

description: Ryan spotted Marcus on the cliff and waved up at him. Marcus gave a single nod and looked back at the sea.
dialogue: Ryan: 'Eh Marcus! Come down later, I cook dinner! Got extra rice!'
